text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Satono Diamond and I have come to
watch Kitasan Black compete in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, Kita's on the track!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Huh... It looks like there's something off about
her...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's nerves.
I think it's more likely because of who isn't running in today's race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature suddenly appears from among the
crowd. She's one of the students who threw
Satono Diamond and the other newcomers a
welcome party when they entered the academy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ah! That's right. You mean the person who won
the Satsuki Sho and Japanese Derby, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yep. She's not racing today, and it seems that
Kitasan was all fired up about beating her here.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It just doesn't quite feel worth it to try hard when
your rival's not there, you know? It's kind of like
when the star of a show is missing.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: The star...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kitaaa!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She's completely focused on the race... Seems I
was worrying for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm certain she'll put on a great performance and show everyone that she's the main star!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Yodo has become grounds for the Kitasan
Festival as Kitasan Black conquers the Kikuka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wooow! Kita was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, seriously? I didn't know Kita was a shining
star herself...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Although, it seemed like she struggled a bit with
her positioning towards the end...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It always comes down to the final sprint for me, so
I would've tried to avoid being trapped on the
inside and pushed toward the outside on the
fourth turn. Then—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. Ugh. You're getting too dazzling
for me too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after returning from watching the Kikuka
Sho...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can keep going! I'm still worried about my
endurance, so can we do some additional
training, please?
choice_data_list:
You're not ready to work on your endurance
yet.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Then, how about I do some incline dashes?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She passionately pleads her case, but since she's
still in her junior year, I want to avoid any training
that will put undue stress on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that putting too much strain on her body
while she's still growing could lead to injury.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Sorry... You're right. Seeing Kita run in the Kikuka
Sho made me feel pressured to work harder too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like yesterday's race triggered something
inside her, and now she's positively bursting with
pent-up energy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if there's a way for her to channel that
energy productively without straining herself.
choice_data_list:
How about we do some special training to break
the school's jinxes?

How about we do some special training to break
the school's jinxes?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That sounds great!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started right away! Where can I find
these jinxes?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Talk about hook, line, and sinker. She's
completely into it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay, what's the first jinx?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's rumored if you play milk caps on the school's
rooftop and win, you'll slip on the stairs on the
way down. Just as I take out some milk caps...
Oh, it's Satono and her trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, what's that? Are you playing milk caps? Can
we join? We're, like, sooo supes bored right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer approaches us excitedly,
accompanied by Ikuno Dictus and Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'd be delighted to have you as opponents! I'm
actually in the middle of undergoing special
training to break jinxes.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're training to... break jinxes? What does that
mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ooh, so that's it. We'll help too!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes, we would be happy to. If it's school jinxes
you're looking for, I know of around ten.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
This is the jinx where if you win a game of milk
caps on the rooftop, you'll slip on the stairs on
the way down, yes?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
In other words, if Satono manages to win a game
and make it down the stairs without slipping, then
she'll have broken the jinx.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, aren't you really good at milk
caps, Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I don't know if I'm good at it, but I do play it a lot. How are you at milk caps, Satono?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I haven't played it very much, but I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I think it's gonna be a toughie, winning against
Nature...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! You made it down the stairs without
tripping!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That's one jinx down!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
There's another jinx where the person who buys
the last juice box here is cursed with bad luck for
the rest of the day.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what a coincidence. This is the very last one,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
To check whether you have bad luck or not, the
two of us will both draw raffle tickets.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno drew the fourth prize ticket and Satono got
the first. Well, you definitely don't have bad luck.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's the second jinx taken care of! I'm on a roll!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And that's ten! I've successfully broken ten jinxes
in a row!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Overcoming ten jinxes is legit wild! Mad respect,
Satono!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! It's not that big a deal, really.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sure it is. It's awesome how you face everything
head-on without backing down, whether it's a jinx
or your family's dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You're like McQueen in that way.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Do you really think so?! You just made my day!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I've... I've always admired McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The way she moves stoically toward her goals
while remaining unfazed even in the face of great
pressure―that's how I aim to be.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Just as McQueen bore and met the expectations
of the Mejiro family, I, too, wish to realize my
family's dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You know, McQueen was complimenting
you for working so hard to make your family's
dreams true.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I'm nowhere near her level yet. I haven't
achieved anything remarkable so far.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Man... All you sparkly go-getters sure have it
tough...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We're rootin' for you, Satono, so do your best!
Don't you dare lose!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I won't! Thank you!
